meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't scale projects (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't scale projects. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Claude Code Skills to Scale Projects
content.seo_description: Learn to master Claude Code skills to overcome scaling bottlenecks. An advanced case study for students using Antigravity to streamline development workflows.
content.answer_block: To scale your projects, integrate Claude Code with Antigravity to automate boilerplate and architectural scaffolding. By leveraging LLM-driven CLI agents, you transform manual coding into orchestrated development, allowing you to manage complex repositories, refactor technical debt, and deploy enterprise-grade features without being overwhelmed by manual infrastructure overhead.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a terminal that won't move. You have a great idea, but the complexity of the architecture is crushing your velocity, turning your dream project into a graveyard of abandoned files. The gap between a student project and a scalable production application is rarely about talent; it is about the ability to manage system complexity.

We solve this by weaponizing Claude Code alongside Antigravity. This isn't just about writing code; it’s about commanding an AI-driven development environment that acts as your senior engineering partner. By the end of this guide, you will transition from a coder who struggles to maintain a single repo to a builder who orchestrates complex, scalable systems with surgical precision.

steps.title: Environment Audit and Baseline
steps.description: Establish a clear architectural baseline for your project to ensure Claude Code understands the boundaries of your codebase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and identify three major bottlenecks preventing scalability in the current folder architecture.

steps.title: Automating Repository Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate high-performance boilerplate, ensuring your project is ready for growth from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular folder structure for a scalable SaaS app using Next.js and TypeScript, prioritizing clean architecture principles.

steps.title: Implementing AI-Driven Refactoring
steps.description: Deploy Claude Code to refactor existing monolithic functions into discrete, testable micro-services.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify long functions in the codebase and suggest a refactoring strategy to break them into smaller, reusable utilities.

steps.title: Automating Documentation and Context
steps.description: Ensure your project remains readable for your future self by automating documentation generation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a comprehensive README.md and technical design document based on the current codebase logic and API endpoints.

steps.title: CI/CD Pipeline Integration
steps.description: Bridge the gap between development and production by setting up automated deployment triggers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs unit tests and checks for linting errors on every pull request.

pro_tips: Always use the --dry-run flag with Claude Code when performing mass refactors to inspect changes before they hit the filesystem.
Keep your Antigravity context window small by passing only relevant file paths rather than the entire root directory.
Use custom system prompts in your Claude Code config to enforce specific coding standards like clean architecture or strict type safety.
Treat your AI CLI agent as a junior developer; always review its proposed changes for 'hallucinated' imports or redundant dependencies.
Leverage Claude Code’s ability to read your git history to understand why specific architectural decisions were made in the past.
content.next_steps: After completing this setup, begin by migrating one of your legacy projects into this new structure. Focus on building out one core feature using the automated scaffolding patterns you've just established.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting complexity dictate your progress. You have the tools, the strategy, and the expertise to scale. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
